title: Garlicky Tomato Borscht
description: A hearty Ukrainian tomato borscht recipe that's easy to make in a weeknight, featuring fresh tomatoes and garlic for an extra savory twist.

ingredients.name: 4 cups fresh chopped mixed greens (cabbage, carrots)

instructions: Prepare tomatoes by gently boiling them for about 30 seconds, then plunging into ice water to stop the cooking. Remove skins and finely chop.
In a large pot, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant but not browned.
Add chopped tomatoes, broth, salt, pepper, and mixed greens to the pot. Stir well.
Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and let it gently simmer for about 20 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
In a small bowl, mix tomato paste with lemon juice until smooth. Pour this mixture into the simmering soup, stirring well.
Simmer for an additional 10 minutes until slightly thickened, then serve hot.
